rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And/Or Adjudication As To (1) Wells Fargo Banks Complaint And (2) Defendants First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 7, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And/Or Adjudication As To (1) Wells Fargo Banks Complaint And (2) Defendants First Amended Cross-Complaint continued to June 29, 2016 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL GALINDO et al VS. SECURITY TITLE INSURANCE CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant U.A. Local 38 Pension Trust Funds Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To Some Or All Causes Of Action Asserted By Plaintiffs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 7, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT U.A. LOCAL 38 PENSION TRUST FUND's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant U.A. Local 38 Pension Trust Funds Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To Some Or All Causes Of Action Asserted By Plaintiffs GRANTED as requested as to certain Plaintiffs and certain causes of action based on the applicable statues of limitations per CCP 335.1 and CCP 340(a). Motion for summary judgment is framed by the allegations in the operative complaint. Moving party has shifted its burden and opposing party failed to create a triable issue of fact. Moving party to prepare order delineating MSJ/MSA as to each Plaintiff and each cause of action subject to this motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL GALINDO et al VS. SECURITY TITLE INSURANCE CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (Joinder) As To Some Of The Causes Of Action Asserted By Certain Plaintiffs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 7, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANTS CIVIC CENTER HOTEL LLC nad BALWANTSINH THAKOR's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (Joinder) As To Some Of The Causes Of Action Asserted By Certain Plaintiffs GRANTED. Ruling on co-defendant's motion for summary adjudication is equally applicable to defendant Civic Center Hotel. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LIDIA AVILA VS. JOEL CABALLERO et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 7, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT JOEL CABALLERO's Motion For Assignment Order DENIED, premature and moving party failed to support its request by admissible evidence. Additionally, no explanation is provided regarding service directly on a represented party. Jai Dadlani in judgment debtor's attorney or record. = (501/REQ)
